title: RU-SMP Modpack
description: A modpack destined to those who plays this one server, and also to everyone who wants to make their game prettier without breaking the Minecraft mood.
body:
![REGIMENTS UNITED LOGO](https://pt-regiment.fr/upload/banner/RUSMP.png)
**One of those modpacks that brings a good mood and comfort.**

I made this little modpack for the players of the RU-SMP server.\
These contains only client-sided mods, textures pack to make the game prettier and also a custom made ressource pack to improve player's exprerience on the server. 


![? Content](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d9911e05e0dd31651a2d18a36b56d86c90ce2ad.png)\
*Here is a list of all mods and texture pack used in this modback:*
This list will be updated if updates happens. 

![cog icon - Mods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06e332f8700c02705d9c465d64ff5d6a8f18712a.png)
- Better Statistics Screen by TheCSDev
- Cloth Config v17 by shedaniel
- Continuity by PepperCode1
- Entity Model Features by Traben
- Entity Texture Features by Traben
- EntityCulling by tr7zw
- Fabric API by FabricMC
- Fabric Language Kotlin by FabricMC
- Forge Config API Port by Fuzs
- Iris by coderbot, IMS212, Justsnoopy30, FoundationGames
- Jade by Snownee
- Mod Menu by Prospector, haykam821, TerraformersMC
- NotEnoughAnimations by tr7zw
- Placeholder API by Patbox
- Polytone by MehVahdJukaar
- Reese's Sodium Options by FlashyReese
- Remove Reloading Screen by dima\_dencep
- Sodium by JellySquid \(jellysquid3\)
- TCD Commons API by TheCSDev
- Xaero's Minimap by xaero96
- YetAnotherConfigLib by isXander
- Zoomify by isXander

![Star icon - Resource packs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1253f5ddf038cbfcb9008224f4556d14be7324b.png)
- Fresh Moves by TrasTick and IthanMendoza
- Fresh Animations by FreshLX
- Icons by Wenan group
- Reimagined Paintings by vadik317
- Reimagined GUI (Dark) by amongstreality
- Reimagined by Reijvi
- Serified Font by bebebea_loste

![trees icon - Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf575f63eea10590a25c1f00c2a9f95340b5374f.png)
- Complementary Shaders - Reimagined by EminGT
- Astralex Shaders by LexBoosT
